case_title: KEVIN SMALLWOOD VS. FRANK GAYLE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2024 CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) FRANK GAYLE; OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
